title: Vue Performance Optimization Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of async components, shallow reactivity (shallowRef/Reactive), and efficient list rendering with keys.

questions.question: Which function allows you to load component code asynchronously (only when needed)?
When should you use shallowRef or shallowReactive in a Vue component?
options: When your data doesn't need deep reactivity (like a large read-only array).
When you only want to use CSS.
When you only want to use older versions.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary benefit of using a unique :key with v-for?
options: It makes the HTML color better.
It helps Vue's virtual DOM correctly track and update each item in the list instead of potentially rebuilding it.

questions.question: Which directive tells Vue to skip re-rendering a piece of static content after the first render (optimizing performance)?
Does Vue with Performance Optimization allow you to build truly fast applications by caching all requests?
options: Yes, as it provides a comprehensive set of built-in tools for both data and rendering optimization.
